resume_data.summary: This is a resume for Het Patel, an aspiring AI Engineer with a focus on Generative AI and Predictive Analytics. They have skills in Python, SQL, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Docker. They have professional experience as a Technical Expert at Recruit Riders Technologies and as a Machine Learning Intern at Space-O Technology, where they worked on customer churn prediction and model training acceleration. They also have experience as a Data Science Intern at FusionBit, focusing on data cleaning and analysis. Notable projects include a medical analysis agent, a Spotify recommendation engine, and a face recognition attendance system. Het Patel holds a B.E. in Information Technology from Gujarat Technological University with a CGPA of 8.23.
key_points: Aspiring AI Engineer skilled in Generative AI and Predictive Analytics.
Proficient in Python, SQL, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and Docker.
Experience in customer churn prediction and model training acceleration.
Developed data cleaning and analysis pipelines.
Created projects like a medical analysis agent, recommendation engine, and face recognition system.
Holds a B.E. in Information Technology from Gujarat Technological University.
resume_data.raw_text_preview:
HET PATEL 
 
Ahmedabad, India | +91 9725647609 | phet4311@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 
Aspiring AI Engineer with an interest in Generative AI and Predictive Analytics. Skilled in 
Python, SQL, and various machine learning libraries, including  TensorFlow and Scikit-learn. 
Experienced in designing multi-agent workflows and deploying basic applications with Docker 
and interested in solving real-world problems with data-driven solutions. 
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
Python, SQL, Machine Learning, Multi -Agent Systems, LLMs, NLP , Computer Vision, 
TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Docker, Git, CI/CD, Flask, Streamlit, FastAPI, Data Preprocessing, 
Feature Engineering, Pandas, NumPy, Tableau 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 
Recruit Riders Technologies | Technical Expert Mahesana | Dec 2025 – Present 
• Provided technical support for AI and Machine Learning development using Python. 
• Assisted in code optimisation and debugging to ensure smooth software performance. 
Space-O Technology | Machine Learning Intern Ahmedabad | Aug 2024 – Feb 2025 
• Developed Customer Churn Prediction models using TensorFlow, achieving a 15% 
reduction in false positives through hyperparameter optimisation (Grid Search). 
• Refactored training workflows with vectorised NumPy operations, resulting in a 20% 
acceleration in model training speed for large-scale datasets. 
FusionBit | Data Science Intern Ahmedabad | Jan 2024 – Apr 2024 
• Designed automated data cleaning and normalisation pipelines for raw client data to 
ensure high-quality input features. 
• Conducted statistical analysis on user behaviour datasets to identify key churn 
indicators, directly influencing feature selection for production models. 
PROJECTS 
Healthcare Helper (Medical Analysis Agent): Built a medical analysis agent using Google  
Gemini and Flask to extract clinical data from prescription images and achieved 95% 
extraction accuracy on OCR.  
Spotify Preference Modelling : Analysed 85,000+ tracks to engineer a content -based 
recommendation engine using K-Means clustering and PCA for dimensionality reduction. 
Face Recognition Attendance System : Developed a real -time attendance automation 
system using Python and OpenCV to streamline user identification processes. 
EDUCATION 
B.E. Information Technology | Gujarat Technological University | CGPA: 8.23  
Graduated: 2024

jd_data.file_path: D:\End to end Job Description and Resume Analyser\interview-prep-system\app\output\uploads\jd_20260401_120548.docx
jd_data.summary: This document is a job description for an AI Automation Expert at AIS Technolabs PVT LTD. The role involves designing, developing, and deploying intelligent automation solutions using AI, machine learning, and workflow automation tools to improve operational efficiency. Key responsibilities include developing ML models, integrating AI tools, automating workflows, analyzing data, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. The required qualifications include a degree in a relevant field, 1-3 years of experience in AI/automation, experience with ML frameworks and automation tools, knowledge of APIs and system integrations, familiarity with LLMs and AI tools, and cloud platform experience. Preferred qualifications include experience with Generative AI, NLP, vector databases, chatbots, and DevOps.
key_points: Design and implement AI-driven automation solutions.
Develop, train, and deploy machine learning models.
Integrate AI tools with existing systems (CRM, ERP, APIs, databases).
Automate repetitive workflows using RPA and AI technologies.
Analyze large datasets to identify automation opportunities and insights.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams.
Monitor and optimize AI models and automation pipelines.
Ensure compliance with data privacy and security standards.
Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI and automation.
Required: Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in CS, Data Science, AI, or related field.
Required: 1-3 years of experience in AI, automation, or related roles.
Required: Experience with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn).
Required: Hands-on experience with automation tools (n8n, Zapier, Make).
Required: Knowledge of APIs, webhooks, and system integrations.
Required: Familiarity with LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI tools (e.g., OpenAI, Claude).
Required: Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
Preferred: Experience with Generative AI and NLP applications.
Preferred: Knowledge of vector databases and embeddings.
Preferred: Experience building chatbots or AI assistants.
jd_data.raw_text_preview:
About Company:-
 AIS Technolabs PVT LTD is an ISO 27001:2013 AND ISO 9001 Certified company and a pioneer in web design and development company from India. We have also been voted as one of the Top 10 mobile app development companies in India. We are a leading IT Consulting and web solution provider for custom software, websites, games, custom web applications, enterprise mobility, mobile apps and cloud-based application design & development
We are amongst the fastest-growing web design and development companies in India, with 3900+ successful projects delivered across the United States, UK, UAE, Canada and other countries. Over 95% of the client retention rate demonstrates our level of services and client satisfaction.
Company Website:-https: //www.aistechnolabs.com/about-us
Job Title: AI Automation Expert Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled AI Automation Expert to design, develop, and deploy intelligent automation solutions that improve operational efficiency and business outcomes. The ideal candidate will combine expertise in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and workflow automation to streamline processes and enable data-driven decision-making.

Key Responsibilities:

Design and implement AI-driven automation solutions for business processes.
Develop, train, and deploy machine learning models for real-world applications.
Integrate AI tools with existing systems (CRM, ERP, APIs, databases).
Automate repetitive workflows using RPA and AI technologies.
Analyze large datasets to identify automation opportunities and insights.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (product, engineering, operations).
Monitor and optimize AI models and automation pipelines for performance.
Ensure compliance with data privacy and security standards.
Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI, automation, and tools.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, AI, or related field.
1–3+ years of experience in AI, automation, or related roles.
Experience with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn).
Hands-on experience with automation tools (n8n, Zapier, Make).
Knowledge of APIs, webhooks, and system integrations.
Familiarity with LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI tools (e.g., OpenAI, Claude).
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking.
Preferred Qualifications:
Experience with Generative AI and NLP applications.
Knowledge of vector databases and embeddings.
Experience building chatbots or AI assistants.
Familiarity with DevOps.
Certifications in AI/ML or RPA tools
